flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Fairleigh Dickinson University-Metropolitan Campus rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.1k → $38.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Fairleigh Dickinson University-Metropolitan Campus rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($33.1k → $38.0k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Fairleigh Dickinson University-Metropolitan Campus fell 14% between 2006 and 2009 (25.0% → 21.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Fairleigh Dickinson University-Metropolitan Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.4% → 0.0%).
